rules.name: vec_smallvec_opportunity
rules.message: Vec<T> for potentially small collections — consider SmallVec for short-lived data
rules.suggestion: SmallVec<[T; 8]> avoids heap allocation for N<=8 items
rules.expected_improvement: Eliminates heap allocation for small collections

rules.name: string_ownership
rules.message: Function takes owned String where &str would suffice
rules.suggestion: Use &str for read-only string parameters — avoids allocation at call site
rules.expected_improvement: Eliminates String clone/allocation on every call

rules.name: hashmap_default
rules.message: HashMap using default SipHash — consider ahash for non-cryptographic use
rules.suggestion: use ahash::AHashMap instead of std::collections::HashMap for 2-3x faster hashing
rules.expected_improvement: 2-3x faster map operations for non-cryptographic keys

rules.name: box_dyn_trait
rules.message: Box<dyn Trait> requires heap allocation and virtual dispatch
rules.suggestion: If variants are known at compile time, use enum dispatch instead

rules.name: sequential_iteration
rules.message: Sequential iteration over large collection — consider rayon par_iter
rules.suggestion: use rayon::prelude::*; collection.par_iter().for_each(...) for parallel processing
rules.expected_improvement: Linear speedup with CPU core count for independent operations

rules.name: f64_where_f32_sufficient
rules.message: f64 used — f32 may be sufficient for rendering/simulation values
rules.suggestion: Use f32 for positions, colors, UVs where sub-millimeter precision not needed
rules.expected_improvement: 2x SIMD throughput, halved memory bandwidth for float arrays

rules.name: repeated_index_lookup
rules.message: Repeated indexing with same key — extract to local variable
rules.suggestion: let item = &collection[idx]; use item.field1, item.field2 instead of indexing twice
rules.expected_improvement: Reduces bounds checks, helps compiler optimize

rules.name: dictionary_bulk_transfer
rules.message: Array<Dictionary> for bulk data transfer — high Variant conversion overhead
rules.suggestion: Use PackedByteArray with MessagePack/JSON for bulk entity snapshots
rules.expected_improvement: 10-100x faster for 100+ entities (eliminates per-field Variant boxing)

rules.name: per_frame_full_snapshot
rules.message: Full snapshot every call — consider delta encoding for frequent updates
rules.suggestion: Track last-sent state, send only changed entities (delta encoding)
rules.expected_improvement: Reduces WebSocket transfer 5-10x for slowly-changing simulations

rules.name: string_passing_ffi
rules.message: #[func] with GString parameter — use StringName for interned strings
rules.suggestion: Use StringName for event names, keys, identifiers passed frequently across FFI
rules.expected_improvement: StringName comparison is O(1) pointer equality vs O(n) string compare

rules.name: wide_query
rules.message: Wide ECS query with 4+ components — may cause archetype fragmentation
rules.suggestion: Split into focused queries; fetch additional components only when needed
rules.expected_improvement: Better cache locality, fewer archetype iterations

rules.name: entity_id_lookup
rules.message: Linear search for entity by ID — maintain index HashMap
rules.suggestion: Keep HashMap<EntityId, Entity> for O(1) lookup by ID
rules.expected_improvement: O(n) → O(1) lookup, critical for 1000+ entities
